name: The Generational Convergence
effect: Unite multiple generational cohorts under a single organisational framework. This card is considered inclusive.

clauses.name: GENERATIONAL TRANSLATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If two cohorts disagree on a tool: Convene a working group to explore both perspectives.

clauses.name: REVERSE MENTORSHIP EFFECT
clauses.rule: If a junior employee explains a platform to a senior one: This is considered a strategic capability.

clauses.name: EVERGREEN RESIGNATION OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the initiative is still running after two years: Credit the initiative. If it has ended: Credit the learning.

witness_quote: We really value diverse perspectives here.

translation_layer.observation: People of different ages work together.
translation_layer.skeptical_question: Was this always just about the seating chart?
